task_objective: Wrap ToggleField components in PanelSectionRow and remove highlightOnFocus to delegate focus highlighting to the outer containers.
design_decisions: Wrapped all QAM ToggleField components in `<PanelSectionRow>` containers to register them correctly in Decky's navigation grid and allow row-level highlighting.
Removed the `highlightOnFocus` prop from ToggleField components to prevent nested focus boundary conflicts and ensure the highlight outlines span the full width of the QAM.
Updated static test suite checks to enforce the wrapped configuration.
results: All 250 tests passed successfully, frontend built and packaged cleanly, quality control audits passed.
